segment.source: Renders an accessible carousel cycling customer quotes one slide at a time — each with quote, author name, title, avatar, and optional star rating — with previous/next controls, dot navigation, and optional autoplay. Use it for: sets of short customer quotes when page space is tight, rotating references on landing or product pages. Prefer 'Grid Testimonial' when all quotes should be visible at once; use 'Review Carousel' for product reviews.
